name: guild
description: Guild marketplace for Claude Code plugins focused on specialist agent teams, durable memory, and evidence-based evolution.

plugins.name: guild
plugins.description: Self-evolving teams of specialist agents for Claude Code. 13 specialists across engineering, content, and commercial groups; a brainstorm-plan-execute-review-verify-reflect lifecycle; a categorized wiki with decision capture; and a self-evolution loop with shadow mode, flip-gating, and versioned rollback. Optional tmux agent-team backend + BM25 wiki search + trace query MCPs.
